_readme: SocialForge ships NO active hooks as of v1.5.0. Earlier versions registered SessionStart, PreToolUse Write/Edit, SubagentStart, and Stop hooks that fired on EVERY Claude Code operation in EVERY project — not just SocialForge work — because Claude Code plugin hooks have no per-directory or per-project scoping. Their work (banner + credential status report, brand-compliance prompt injection, image-approval verification) already lives at the right architectural layer: per-agent instructions for compliance and approval rules, /sf:status command for on-demand credential reporting. Prior config is preserved at hooks/hooks-reference.example.json with rationale notes per hook. To re-enable a specific hook, copy its entry into the 'hooks' object below.
